title: Alberta bill requiring provincial approval of federal funding risks political meddling, academics say
author: Janet French
notes: Primary source for EVT-070. Academic criticism of Bill 18 (Provincial Priorities Act 2024, tabled April 10 2024) requiring provincial approval before federal funding reaches municipalities, universities, school boards, and regional health authorities. Janet French reports on concerns about political meddling in academic research and risk of delayed or halted federal research funding. Date corrected from 2024-04-01 (CSV error) to 2024-04-12.
